title: Dense Greek Dry Shrimp Avgolemono Fritters
description: A traditional Greek dish featuring dried shrimp in a bouncy avgolemono sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine dried shrimp, rice flour, egg yolks, lemon juice, beurre-monte, chicken broth, garlic, and parsley.
Mix well until a smooth batter forms.
Heat about 2cm of oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop the shrimp mixture into the hot oil, 6-8 fritters at a time.
Fry the fritters until they are golden brown, about 4-5 minutes.
Drain the fritters on paper towels.
Serve the fritters hot with a side of avgolemono sauce.
To make the avgolemono sauce, combine lemon juice, chicken broth, and egg yolks in a blender.
Strain the sauce through a fine-mesh sieve to remove any lumps.
Serve the fritters with the avgolemono sauce spooned over the top.
